commit.message:
fix: remove lexical from peerDependencies — bundled as dependency

lexical is an internal implementation detail. Users never touch the
Lexical API directly (no public types, no exported Lexical instances).
Making it a peer was wrong — it required users to install an extra
package they never use.

- Remove peerDependencies.lexical from @lexify/core
- Remove peerDependencies.lexical from @lexify/plugins
- Update install instructions in all READMEs and docs

Users now only need:
  pnpm add @lexify/core

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: lexify
repository.description: Headless, plugin-driven Rich Text Editor built on Lexical

Fix: panel scale mismatch and invisible scatter on project load

Panel scale: save sceneUnitsPerMeter per panel during serialize and
use it during restore via _createPanelObject override parameter.
Previously panels were recreated with DEFAULT_SCENE_UNITS_PER_METER
(0.2) instead of the calibrated value, causing wrong sizes.

Scatter: set finalOnly=false when loading saved projects so base
scatter (green dots) renders immediately via 1.5s fallback timer.
Previously finalOnly=true meant dots only appeared after full shading
raycasts completed, which could take very long or hang silently.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Publish Secrets Rotation Readiness Checklist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Publish Third-Party Vendor Due Diligence Checklist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

V1.0 Production: 14 features, critical bug fixes, Share Extension, rebrand to VelGo

Features:
- Search suggestions (Google/DuckDuckGo/Bing autocomplete)
- Dark Reader (CSS injection dark mode for any page)
- Page translation (Google Translate injection)
- Video detector (JS-based media detection)
- Page capture (full-page screenshot, PDF export, print)
- QR code scanner (AVCaptureSession camera scanner)
- Privacy Shield (per-site tracker/ad stats with weekly report)
- Custom filter lists (ABP format import, auto-update)
- DNS-over-HTTPS (Cloudflare/Google/Quad9)
- Cookie auto-delete (configurable per-domain whitelist)
- Tab groups (color-coded collections)
- Gesture shortcuts (configurable navigation gestures)
- Share Extension (open shared URLs/text in VelGo)
- Advanced ad blocker (269 bundled WebKit rules from JSON)

Bug fixes:
- Reader mode blank screen (Task cancellation + error feedback)
- Tab persistence data loss (removed destructive UserDefaults.removeObject)
- WKWebView memory leak (script handler cleanup)
- MediaPlayer observer race condition
- Tab preview empty on relaunch (snapshot restore from disk)
- Toolbar debounce (prevent accidental taps)
- Tracking param redirect loop fix
- Snapshot alpha warning (opaque UIGraphicsImageRenderer)
- 9 Swift 6 deinit isolation warnings
- AdBlock regex lookahead crash (WKContentRuleList incompatibility)
- WebView pool: LRU eviction with proper cleanup
- Debounced autosave (2s) prevents data loss on crash

Architecture:
- WebView pool for tab switching without reload
- Removed .id(activeTab.id) forcing view recreation
- 9 new services registered in DIContainer
- Share Extension target with velgo:// URL scheme
- .gitignore: DS_Store, xcuserdata

Rebrand: Display name VeloBrowser → VelGo (UI, widgets, privacy policy)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: VeloBrowser
repository.description: Velo Browser — Fast, Private & Ad-Free iOS Browser with background audio, PiP, and file downloads. Built with Swift 6, SwiftUI, WKWebView.

Publish Post-Incident Follow-up Checklist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Publish Service Recovery Checklist

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Sprint 45: perf/battery optimization + fix weather/wind particles + UI lock

Performance & Battery:
- Battery-aware quality scaling (battery_plus: reduce particles/effects at <50/20/10%)
- Background mode optimization (suppress rendering, keep data collection)
- LRU cache eviction (500 entries / 50MB cap with access-order tracking)
- Track history extended to 5000 points for 12h passages
- Weather forecast frames capped at 168 (7 days)

Weather & Wind Particle Fixes:
- Fix effectiveWeatherData missing atmosphericPoints in weather_layer_stack
- Fix WeatherData.isEmpty ignoring atmosphericPoints
- Fix wind_particle_overlay checking data.isEmpty instead of windPoints.isEmpty
- Add debug logging to weather fetch (viewport bounds + point counts)

UI Lock:
- Add layoutLocked toggle in Settings > Display section
- When locked: hide gauge edit button, disable drag-and-drop
- Persisted in SharedPreferences, i18n for EN/DE/HR/IT

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: vertical pipeline layout for BRCA1 Constrained Quantum Search

Replace 2-column grid with a numbered vertical pipeline:
- Add PipelineStep component: step circle + gradient connector line +
  state-aware card (amber=pending, emerald=done, slate=locked)
- Reorder steps to natural flow: 1(codon) → 2(NCBI) → 3(window) →
  4(run) → 5(results)
- Step 3 locks until nearbyWindows loaded; Step 4 locks until markerInfo
- Results (Step 5) enters via AnimatePresence with no trailing connector
- Header separated into its own card above the pipeline
- Remove StepBadge component (superseded by PipelineStep)
- All state, effects, and API logic unchanged

feat(W-119/W-123/W-124/W-125): webhook audit + apply — 0 live hooks, WEBHOOK_RECEIVER_URL override, registry + ops doc + token guide + PR #3501 cherry-pick (#3499)

* Initial plan

* docs(W-119): update user documentation for clarity

- docs/getting-started.md: remove two duplicate 'Typical ranges' /
  'Defaults live in' paragraphs that were repeated three times
- docs/NEWCOMER_GUIDE.md: correct Python prereq 3.10+ → 3.12+ (matches
  pyproject.toml requires-python); fix misleading 'Start here' link
  label (was 'docs/README_ROOT.md', href → index.md; now 'Documentation Hub')
- docs/Usage_Guide.md: refresh stale 'Last reviewed' date 2025-10-19 → 2026-03-05
- CHANGELOG.md: add W-119 entry (Cognitive Pre-flight REQ-5)
- docs/accountability/AGENT_ACCOUNTABILITY_REPORT.md: update branch/date (REQ-4)

Co-authored-by: mbaetiong <91555439+mbaetiong@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(auth): write provenance session token [skip ci]

* fix(W-119b): remove duplicate run: key in copilot-setup-steps.yml

The 'Export Auth Tokens' step had an orphaned `if:` + `run:` fragment
accidentally appended inside its YAML mapping, creating a duplicate
`run:` mapping key. GitHub's parser rejects this:

  yaml: mapping key "run" already defined at line 408

Fix: extract the orphaned fragment into its own properly-scoped step
"⚙️ Load Custom Agent Configuration" (with the if: condition it
already declared) positioned immediately after the auth-token step.

Also updates CHANGELOG.md (REQ-5) and AGENT_ACCOUNTABILITY_REPORT.md
(REQ-4).

Co-authored-by: mbaetiong <91555439+mbaetiong@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs(W-120): add larger-runners upgrade plan for Copilot agent

Create docs/plans/larger-runners-upgrade.md with:
- Why upgrade (timeout risk on ml-heavy, slow cold builds on 2-core)
- Target runner sizes table (4-core default, 8/16-core options)
- Org-admin prerequisites (runner group provisioning by @mbaetiong)
- Exact code change: runs-on ubuntu-latest → ubuntu-4-core (single line)
- Optional timeout-minutes increase to 59
- Rollback procedure (single-line revert)
- Implementation checklist
- Before/after performance estimates
